crawled_name:
Last updated: Wed Apr 29 2026

OVERVIEW

Sausalito California Police Department
acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Sausalito California Police Department and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires a valid reason and is stored indefinitely.
hotlist_policy:
Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.
USAGE

Data Retention

The number of days data is retained.

365 days

Total Cameras

Number of LPR and other cameras.

12

overview:
Last updated: Wed Apr 29 2026

OVERVIEW

Sausalito California Police Department uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. Sausalito California Police Department utilizes retroactive search to solve crimes after they've occurred. Additionally, Sausalito California Police Department utilizes real time alerting of hotlist vehicles to capture wanted criminals. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public.

POLICIES
